hero.title: A House of
hero.subtitle: कृषी-जेन इनोव्हेशन — शेतकऱ्यांसाठी सेंद्रिय उत्पादने
hero.description: At Agri-Gen Innovation, we bring together agriculture and advanced science — integrating genetics, technology, and smart farming to develop innovative solutions for sustainable agriculture.

business.title: Dual-Engine Business Ecosystem
business.description: As a leading agricultural manufacturing and marketing company, we specialize in certified organic inputs while dedicated to supporting farmers with products that enhance soil health and contribute to healthier, more sustainable food systems.
business.b2bDesc: Strategic partners for manufacturers. We provide high-purity raw materials and formulations for industrial agro-chemical and bio-input production.
business.b2cDesc: Direct solutions for the land. Custom-labeled, branded finished products designed specifically for regional farmer needs and high-yield results.

values.title: Our Core Values
values.subtitle: The fundamental principles that guide every action we take and every innovation we deliver for the farming community.

purpose.title: Delivering Excellence that Brings Smiles to Farmers
purpose.quote: Our true success isn't measured in revenue, but in the prosperity of the hands that feed the world.

farmerStories.title: Farmer Stories
farmerStories.subtitle: Real results from real farmers across Maharashtra

about.label: About Agri-Gen Innovation
about.title: Transforming Agriculture through Innovation
about.commitmentDesc: To deliver verified, effective, and result-oriented solutions that help farmers maximize crop productivity and ensure better crop protection across the globe.

mission.pageTitle: Advancing Agriculture for a Better Tomorrow
mission.missionText: To drive next-generation agriculture through advanced agri-tech solutions, delivering innovative and high-quality products that address real field challenges. We are committed to ethical business practices, continuous research, and farmer-focused services.
mission.visionText: To transform nature's intelligence into sustainable and resilient agriculture through science-driven innovation. We empower farmers with advanced solutions that enhance productivity, restore ecosystems, and ensure long-term soil health.
mission.drivingGrowthDesc: We believe in transforming complex science into simple, effective field solutions. Our commitment to farmers is unwavering, as we aim to pave the way for a more food-secure and greener future.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Connect with our experts for bulk inquiries, distribution partnerships, or technical product support.
contact.address: GAT No.306, Old Janori Road, Near Hanuman Mandir, Jaulke, Tal. Dindori, Dist. Nashik 422207, Maharashtra, India
contact.addressLocal: गट नं. ३०६, जुनी जानोरी रोड, हनुमान मंदिराजवळ, जौळके, ता. दिंडोरी, जि. नाशिक ४२२२०७

footer.tagline: Trusted Organic Agri-Inputs from Nashik, Maharashtra
